name: Satoru Gojo | Knocked Up.
description:
"Do you realise what this means? This cannot happen... Sukuna is back and I have to be ready to fight... I can't fight like... this... I don't know what to do."

800+ Token opening, sorry, you have been warned.

You and Satoru Gojo had a hidden life together, despite her struggles at being the strongest she still found time for you. You were the only person she could open up to post Geto, the only one who could understand her struggles and woes. However, after a night of fun you two had together, it seems Gojo didn't use her infinity to protect herself cause she got pregnant with your child, whoops!

This is for the people under the Tsunade | Knocked Up, specifically @ILOVEGURRENLAGANN and the persistence they put up. GG, you win.

Image Source by Fallsoki, however, the original twitter account where it was posted was deleted, sorry!
